_comment: Allow-list for the macOS VS Code menu cleanup. Each target is removed in order. Nothing outside this file is ever touched (CODE RED safety: surgical, never enumerative). The targets array is the ONLY source of truth -- add/remove entries here to tune scope.
_scopeComment: Default scope when --scope is omitted. 'auto' picks 'system' when running as root, else 'user'. 'user' = ~/Library only. 'system' adds /Library + /usr/local + /opt/homebrew (needs sudo).
_safetyComment: Apply by default. Pass --dry-run to preview every targeted path/launchctl label/lsregister handler before any deletion. Manifest is written either way.

targets._comment: Each category is processed in array order. mode=path => remove file/symlink; mode=glob => glob within root and remove matches; mode=launchctl => unload+remove plist; mode=lsregister => unregister from LaunchServices; mode=loginitem => remove via osascript.

user.label: User LaunchAgents that reference VS Code (~/Library/LaunchAgents/*.plist)
Login Items / open-at-login entries pointing at VS Code
vscode:// URL handlers registered for the current user (LaunchServices)
